error_signature: lost external services credentials after update
title: Credentials lost after updating n8n in Docker
symptom: After updating n8n, all credentials for external services are lost, requiring re-entry of information.
root_cause: The credentials are stored in a specific directory that is not correctly mapped in the Docker configuration. If the data folder is not set to persist, updates can overwrite or clear the stored credentials.
fix_steps: Change the volume mapping in your Docker Compose file to use '/home/node/.n8n'
Ensure that the DATA_FOLDER variable points to a persistent location
Restart the n8n service to apply changes
agent_instruction: Update the Docker Compose file to map the correct data folder for n8n credentials.
